claim_text: Recipients must submit quarterly progress and expenditure reports.

gold_evidence.quote: Recipients are required to submit quarterly progress and expenditure reports.

claim_text: Prior approval is required before reallocating funds above the permitted threshold.

gold_evidence.quote: Prior written approval is required for budget category reallocations exceeding 10 percent.

claim_text: Procurement above the stated threshold requires competitive solicitation.

gold_evidence.quote: Purchases exceeding $50,000 require competitive solicitation.

claim_text: Funds may not be used for lobbying activities.

gold_evidence.quote: Grant funds may not be used to support lobbying activities.

notes: Evidence concerns support for lobbying; claim wording may need alignment.

claim_text: Quarterly expenditure reports are due within 30 days of quarter close.

gold_evidence.quote: Expenditure reports shall be submitted within 30 days after the end of each quarter.

claim_text: Recipients must maintain documentation for audit.

gold_evidence.quote: Recipients shall maintain records sufficient to support expenditures for audit.

claim_text: Subrecipients must be monitored at least annually.

gold_evidence.quote: Pass-through entities shall conduct subrecipient monitoring at least annually.

claim_text: Failure to correct audit findings may result in suspension.

gold_evidence.quote: Failure to implement corrective action may result in suspension of funding.

claim_text: Records must be retained for seven years after closeout.

gold_evidence.quote: Records shall be retained for a period of three years after final payment.

notes: Retention period in source differs from claim.

claim_text: Documents must be produced upon request for audit.

gold_evidence.quote: Recipients shall produce records upon request by the awarding agency or its designee.

claim_text: Budget reallocation above 10 percent requires prior approval.

gold_evidence.quote: Budget category reallocations exceeding 10 percent require prior written approval.

claim_text: Recipients may not exceed the administrative cost cap.

gold_evidence.quote: Administrative costs may not exceed 15 percent of total direct costs.

notes: Verify whether cap is per award or total.

claim_text: Program performance reports are due semiannually.

gold_evidence.quote: Program performance reports shall be submitted semiannually.

claim_text: Repeated failure to report may trigger grant termination.

gold_evidence.quote: Repeated failure to submit required reports may result in compliance review and possible termination.

claim_text: All safety incidents must be reported within 24 hours.

gold_evidence.quote: Reportable safety incidents shall be reported to the department within 24 hours.

claim_text: The memo applies to all state-funded transportation projects.

gold_evidence.quote: This guidance applies to all state-funded transportation projects.

claim_text: Contractors must certify compliance with prevailing wage.

gold_evidence.quote: Contractors shall certify compliance with applicable prevailing wage requirements.

claim_text: Payroll records may not be withheld from the agency.

gold_evidence.quote: Payroll records shall be made available for inspection upon request.

claim_text: Recertification of eligibility is required annually.

gold_evidence.quote: Eligibility shall be recertified at least annually.

claim_text: Noncompliance with recertification leads to immediate termination.

gold_evidence.quote: Failure to complete recertification may result in review and possible termination of assistance.

notes: Source says possible termination, not immediate.

claim_text: Environmental documentation must be completed before construction.

gold_evidence.quote: Environmental review and documentation shall be completed prior to construction.

claim_text: The guidance covers all federally assisted projects.

gold_evidence.quote: This guidance applies to projects receiving federal financial assistance.

claim_text: Indirect cost rate may not exceed the negotiated rate.

gold_evidence.quote: Indirect costs shall not exceed the federally negotiated rate.

notes: Federal vs state rate context may differ.

claim_text: Cost allocation plans must be submitted for approval.

gold_evidence.quote: Cost allocation plans require approval by the budget office.

claim_text: Disclosure of potential conflicts is required annually.

gold_evidence.quote: Annual disclosure of potential conflicts of interest is required.

claim_text: Personnel with conflicts may not participate in the award.

gold_evidence.quote: Personnel with a conflict shall recuse themselves from the award decision.

notes: Source requires recusal; claim frames as prohibition.

claim_text: Material breach may result in termination after notice.

gold_evidence.quote: Material breach may result in termination following written notice and opportunity to cure.

claim_text: Recipients have 30 days to cure before termination.

gold_evidence.quote: The recipient shall have 30 days from notice to demonstrate cure unless otherwise specified.

claim_text: Health data must be reported in de-identified form where required.

gold_evidence.quote: Reporting of health data shall use de-identified form where required by policy.

claim_text: Personally identifiable information may not be disclosed without consent.

gold_evidence.quote: PII shall not be disclosed without appropriate consent or legal authority.

claim_text: Contractors must submit performance reports monthly.

gold_evidence.quote: Contractors shall submit monthly performance reports.

claim_text: Payment may be withheld for documented performance failures.

gold_evidence.quote: The agency may withhold payment for documented failure to meet performance standards.

claim_text: Subcontracting above a threshold requires prior approval.

gold_evidence.quote: Subcontracts exceeding 25 percent of the award require prior approval.

notes: Threshold applies to percent of award.

claim_text: Pass-through entities must monitor subrecipients.

gold_evidence.quote: Pass-through entities are responsible for monitoring subrecipient performance.

claim_text: Equipment purchased with grant funds must be tracked.

gold_evidence.quote: Equipment acquired with grant funds shall be tracked in the designated system.

claim_text: Disposition of equipment requires agency approval.

gold_evidence.quote: Disposition of equipment shall be approved by the awarding agency.

claim_text: Time and effort must be certified by the employee or supervisor.

gold_evidence.quote: Time and effort shall be certified by the employee or supervisory official.

claim_text: Certification is required at least semiannually.

gold_evidence.quote: Certification of time and effort is required semiannually.

claim_text: Reasonable accommodation requests must be processed within 10 days.

gold_evidence.quote: Requests for reasonable accommodation shall be processed in a timely manner.

claim_text: The policy applies to all programs receiving state funds.

gold_evidence.quote: This policy applies to all programs receiving state financial assistance.

claim_text: Final financial report is due within 90 days of closeout.

gold_evidence.quote: The final financial report shall be submitted within 90 days of project closeout.

claim_text: Unobligated funds must be returned at closeout.

gold_evidence.quote: Unobligated balances shall be returned to the awarding agency at closeout.

claim_text: Retaliation against whistleblowers is prohibited.

gold_evidence.quote: Retaliation against individuals who report concerns in good faith is prohibited.

claim_text: Concerns may be reported to the Inspector General.

gold_evidence.quote: Concerns may be reported to the Office of the Inspector General.

claim_text: Bid bonds are required for construction contracts above the threshold.

gold_evidence.quote: Bid bonds are required for construction contracts exceeding $100,000.

claim_text: Contractors may not substitute key personnel without approval.

gold_evidence.quote: Key personnel changes require notification to the contracting officer.

notes: Source requires notification; claim states approval.

claim_text: Corrective action plans must be submitted within 60 days.

gold_evidence.quote: A corrective action plan shall be submitted within 60 days of identification.

claim_text: Unresolved findings may lead to disallowance of costs.

gold_evidence.quote: Unresolved audit findings may result in disallowance of costs.

claim_text: Per diem may not exceed the published state rate.

gold_evidence.quote: Per diem rates shall not exceed the state published rate.

claim_text: Travel must be pre-approved for out-of-state trips.

gold_evidence.quote: Out-of-state travel requires pre-approval.

claim_text: Program income must be reported and used in accordance with the award.

gold_evidence.quote: Program income shall be reported and used in accordance with award terms.

claim_text: Program income may not be used to supplant existing funding.

gold_evidence.quote: Program income shall not be used to supplant non-federal funds.

claim_text: Recipients must cooperate with desk reviews and monitoring visits.

gold_evidence.quote: Recipients shall cooperate with desk reviews and on-site monitoring.

claim_text: Refusal to provide access may result in suspension.

gold_evidence.quote: Failure to provide access for monitoring may result in suspension of funding.

claim_text: Participation goals for small business must be reported.

gold_evidence.quote: Annual reporting of small and minority business participation is required.

claim_text: Contracts over $500,000 must meet diversity targets.

gold_evidence.quote: Larger contracts are subject to participation goals as set in the solicitation.

claim_text: Continuation requests must demonstrate non-supplanting.

gold_evidence.quote: Continuation funding requests must demonstrate that funds will not supplant.

claim_text: Federal funds may not replace state or local appropriations.

gold_evidence.quote: Federal funds shall not be used to replace state or local funds that would otherwise be available.

claim_text: Breach notification must be provided within 72 hours where required.

gold_evidence.quote: Breach notification shall be provided within 72 hours as required by applicable law.

claim_text: Repeated security violations may result in contract termination.

gold_evidence.quote: Material or repeated security violations may lead to review and possible termination.
